visual_description: A man in a light-colored jacket leans over a woman lying in a hospital bed. The woman, wearing a white hospital gown, looks up at him with a pained expression. The man gently places his hand on her stomach as he speaks to her.
audio_description: A man speaks in a concerned tone, followed by a loud, sustained electronic beep.
